title: Per-project team configuration
description: Project-level config read by the /team interpreter from `.claude/team.config.json`. Makes role→agent, model, and scope resolution deterministic and per-project instead of inferred at runtime. All fields optional — absent values fall back to built-in defaults (see workflows/team.config.example.json for the defaults).

roles.description: Maps a workflow role (used in profile stages) to a concrete agent name. Unmapped roles fall back to the built-in default of the same name.

models.description: Maps a role to a model override (opus|sonnet|haiku). The wildcard key '*' sets the default. Priority: explicit role > '*' > agent's own frontmatter.

scope_map.description: Ordered glob→scope rules. First matching glob (against a touched/planned file) sets the scope and its dev agent. Generated/extended by the /team-scope command (P3).

flags.description: Glob expressions defining scope flags used by `conditional` rules in profiles.

design_system.description: Design system name; the `ui` review role reads ~/.claude/design-systems/<name>.md.
